1: Then the LORD LORD answered Job out of the whirlwind, and said,
3: For I will demand of thee, and answer thou me.
5: Or who hath stretched the line upon it?
6: Or who laid the corner stone thereof;
7: And all the sons of God shouted for joy?
8: When it brake forth, as if as if it had issued out of the womb?
9: And thick darkness a swaddlingband for it,
11: And here shall thy proud waves be stayed?
12: And And caused the dayspring to know his place;
13: That the wicked might be shaken out of it?
14: And they stand as a garment.
15: And the high arm shall be broken.
16: Or hast thou walked in the search of the depth?
17: Or hast thou seen the doors of the shadow of death?
18: Declare if thou knowest it all.
19: And as for as for darkness, where is is the place thereof,
20: And that thou shouldest know the paths to to the house thereof?
21: Or because because the number of thy days is is great?
22: Or hast thou seen the treasures of the hail,
23: Against the day of battle and war?
24: Which Which scattereth the east wind upon the earth?
25: Or a way for the lightning of thunder;
26: On On the wilderness, wherein there is there is no man;
27: And to cause the bud of the tender herb to spring forth?
28: Or who hath begotten the drops of dew?
29: And the hoary frost of heaven, who hath gendered it?
30: And the face of the deep is frozen.
31: Or loose the bands of Orion?
32: Or canst thou guide Arcturus with his sons?
33: Canst thou set the dominion thereof in the earth?
34: That abundance of waters may cover thee?
35: And say unto thee, Here we are? are?
36: Or who hath given understanding to the heart?
37: Or who can stay the bottles of heaven,
38: And the clods cleave fast together?
39: Or fill the appetite of the young lions,
40: And And abide in the covert to lie in wait?
41: They wander for lack of meat.
